settings.title: A Weekly Bloom Subscription Lands at Petalry
settings.excerpt: Fresh stems on your table every week, chosen by us from whatever is at its peak.
settings.body:
We have been asked for this for a long time, and it is finally here. Petalry now offers a weekly flower subscription you can collect or have delivered.

Each bunch is built around what is freshest that week, so no two are quite the same. Spring might bring ranunculus and anemone, summer something looser with garden roses and herbs.

How the subscription works

You do not pick the flowers, and that is rather the point. Each week we build the bunch around whatever is at its peak, which means you get the best of the season instead of the same arrangement on repeat. Letting the market decide also keeps things interesting, since the bunch genuinely changes as the year turns. We wrap it the day you collect or the morning we deliver, so it reaches your table as fresh as it gets.

It is built to be easy to live with rather than another thing to manage. Travel plans, busy weeks, a month away. None of it is a problem.

The simple terms

  • Choose weekly or every other week, whichever suits your table.
  • Pause whenever you travel and pick it back up when you return.
  • Cancel any time, with no long commitment.

It is the easiest way we know to keep something alive on the kitchen table. Set it up once and a fresh bunch simply appears, chosen by us from whatever is at its best that week.
